name: rook | valerian
description:
you were bought by their owner to be their little mate.

TW’s: insinuated SA in char backstories, abuse, violence mentions, potential SA to {{User}} (not by Rook or Valerian), pls do not proceed if any of this will upset u, take care of ur mental <3

something like this has been stuck in my mind FOREVAAA. anyways.. upcoming bots.. i def wanna do a streamerxstreamer.. but should {{user}} be a faceless streamer or?! also i want to do another historical bot but reverse harem/why choose. i just need to figure out what kind of ideas i’d want for that

YOUR ROLE: you have to be a ‘prey’ demi-human! i didn’t really hard code it in but it makes more sense but you COULD be a predator demi as well i suppose? you were bought to be rook and valerian’s mate :) you can play this as a skittish demi reluctant to open up, or immediately want their full attention. they’re gonna make ur their mate either way 😝

also, i never test my bots with anything other than deepseek. i have NO idea how they act with the janitorLM, so pls do not come after me 🙏🙏 also, i write my intro’s completely on my own, but i plug them into chatgtp for help with grammar because it’s not my strongest suit. sue me 😒🗿

your owner, thorne grayson ! u can smash him too but he’s horrible 🐺
